{{CargoOrgan
|name=EMR Mutant Neuron
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10854
|idx=59
|description=This anomalous neuron, warped by electromagnetic radiation, possesses extraordinary sensory and cognitive powers, capable of receiving and interpreting signals from ambient electromagnetic waves.
|skill=
|hp=1324
|def=132
|atk=219
|rush=148
|gene1=In Gene Sims, Ignore DEF +2%
|gene2=Per 5 Shrine Flying Objects shot, {race} DEF +8
Shrine flying objects shot: 100/100
|gene3=In Gene Sims, RUSH DMG +10%
|gene4=In Gene Sims, CRIT DMG +10%
|gene7=In Gene Sims, CRIT DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
